message:
test(packs): add 15 pack enable/disable plumbing edge-case tests

Cover expand_enabled_ordered, category expansion, subpack isolation,
deduplication, nonexistent pack filtering, keyword collection from
enabled-only packs, keyword deduplication, keyword index building,
deterministic ordering, tier ordering, category listing, and two
invariant checks (all packs have keywords, all packs instantiate).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
